title: Runtime-neutral session id + sessionless-mutation refusal in concurrent mode
action: (1) resolveSessionId (skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/claims.mjs:66-71): insert BEE_SESSION_ID between the flag and CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID (chain: flag > BEE_SESSION_ID > CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID > null). Unify lock.mjs:154's direct env read to the same chain WITHOUT importing claims.mjs into lock.mjs (lock must stay dependency-light: duplicate the two-env read inline with a comment naming claims.resolveSessionId as canonical). Grep all direct CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID reads (cells.mjs:236/263/1725, reservations.mjs:135, recovery.mjs:27/229, bee.mjs:892/1108, hooks/) and route each through resolveSessionId or the same documented chain. (2) Concurrent-mode sessionless refusal: add isConcurrentMode(root) to claims.mjs = at least one OTHER session record with live heartbeat (reuse the msh-5 staleness window constant). In claimCell and reservations reserve, when the acting session id resolves null AND isConcurrentMode, refuse with a typed error naming --session-id and BEE_SESSION_ID; single-session sessionless behavior byte-unchanged. Tests: test_claims.mjs rows for the env chain (BEE_SESSION_ID wins over CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID, flag wins over both) + concurrent-refusal + solo-sessionless-still-works; test_reservations.mjs row for reserve refusal. RED first (stash), then GREEN + full verify.

truths: BEE_SESSION_ID works everywhere a session id is resolved; priority flag > BEE_SESSION_ID > CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID proven by tests.
Sessionless claim/reserve refuses with a typed error ONLY when another live session exists; solo behavior byte-identical.
prohibitions: Do NOT touch cells.mjs mutator locking or worktree-store.mjs (hardening-4b owns those).
Do NOT change claim-file O_EXCL semantics.

trace.outcome: Runtime-neutral BEE_SESSION_ID session-id chain + concurrent-mode sessionless-mutation refusal (claimCellFile + reserve)

Unstashed to restore the new code.","green_evidence":"test_claims.mjs 21/0, test_reservations.mjs 8/0 standalone after the fix (plus a test-fixture isolation fix, not a behavior change: the shared claimsRoot carries residual live session records from earlier rows in the same file, so the D1 sessionless-claim rows and the new solo-claim row now stale every session record in that root first to genuinely exercise the SOLO case). .bee/bin/lib/{claims,lock,reservations}.mjs copied byte-identical from the templates; .claude-plugin/.codex-plugin skill trees regenerated via scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs.
